parameters.subject: 💰 Daily Financial Summary - {{$json.date}} - {{$json.currency}}{{$json.totalRevenue}}
parameters.html:
💰 Daily Financial Summary

Date: {{$json.date}}

Gross Revenue:{{$json.currency}}{{$json.totalRevenue}}
Total Commissions:{{$json.currency}}{{$json.totalCommissions}}
Net Revenue:{{$json.currency}}{{$json.netRevenue}}

📊 Daily Metrics

  • Total Tours: {{$json.totalTours}}
  • Total Customers: {{$json.totalCustomers}}
  • Active Providers: {{$json.totalProviders}}
  • Avg Revenue/Tour: {{$json.currency}}{{$json.averageRevenuePerTour}}

Provider Breakdown
